sentences.english: I ride my bicycle to school when the weather is nice.
sentences.korean: 날씨가 좋을 때 자전거를 타고 학교에 가요.

sentences.english: It is a red mountain bike that I got for my birthday.
Riding a bike is faster than walking and it is good exercise.
sentences.korean: 자전거는 걷는 것보다 빠르고 좋은 운동이에요.

sentences.english: I always wear a helmet for safety.
On weekends I ride along the river path with my dad.
sentences.korean: 주말에는 아빠와 강변 길을 따라 타요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
